title: Load landing page
steps: 1. Open / | 2. Review hero, CTA buttons, and top-level navigation
expected_result: Landing page renders without layout issues and CTA links to /app, /login, and /merchant are visible and clickable

title: Customer login redirect
steps: 1. Open /login | 2. Click the customer entry button
expected_result: User is routed to /app and customer shell loads

title: Customer register redirect
steps: 1. Open /register | 2. Click the mock sign-up CTA
expected_result: User is routed to /app after registration CTA

title: Load customer home shell
steps: 1. Open /app | 2. Verify header, cart badge, and mobile bottom navigation
expected_result: Customer home renders with navigation, header actions, and no broken sections

title: Search updates product results
steps: 1. Open /app/search | 2. Enter a product keyword in the search input
expected_result: Visible product results update to match the entered query

title: Open category product listing
steps: 1. From /app open any category link | 2. Review the resulting listing page
expected_result: Category page opens and shows products matching the selected category

title: Open store detail page
steps: 1. From home or category listing open any store card | 2. Review store profile and products
expected_result: Store page shows store details and that store's product list

title: Open product detail page
steps: 1. Open any product detail page from a product card | 2. Review price, pickup window, and quantity controls
expected_result: Product detail renders with pricing, pickup information, and add-to-cart controls

title: Quick add from product card
steps: 1. Open /app or /app/search | 2. Click quick add on a product card
expected_result: Product is added immediately and the cart badge increments

title: Add to cart from product detail
steps: 1. Open a product detail page | 2. Set quantity within stock limit | 3. Click add to cart
expected_result: Selected quantity is added to cart and cart badge updates

title: Block cross-store cart mix
precondition: Cart already contains an item from one store
steps: 1. Add a product from Store A | 2. Open a product from Store B | 3. Try to add it to cart
expected_result: Confirmation dialog appears before replacing the existing cart with another store's item

title: Update cart quantities
precondition: Cart contains at least one item
steps: 1. Open /app/cart | 2. Increase quantity | 3. Decrease quantity
expected_result: Quantity changes stay within available stock and totals update correctly

title: Remove and clear cart items
precondition: Cart contains at least two items from the same store
steps: 1. Open /app/cart | 2. Remove one item | 3. Use clear cart action
expected_result: Selected item is removed and clear cart empties the full cart

title: Place order with mock payment
precondition: Cart contains at least one item
steps: 1. Open /app/cart | 2. Continue to /app/checkout | 3. Select PromptPay or mobile banking | 4. Place the order
expected_result: Order is created in local state, cart is emptied, and user is redirected to /app/orders/[orderId]

title: Review active orders and history
steps: 1. Open /app/orders | 2. Switch between active and history tabs
expected_result: Orders appear in the appropriate tab groups based on their current status

title: Review order detail
steps: 1. Open any order detail page | 2. Review status, pickup code, totals, and payment method
expected_result: Order detail shows the correct status badge, pickup code, line items, totals, and payment method

title: Review customer profile summary
steps: 1. Open /app/profile | 2. Review summary cards and settings link
expected_result: Profile page renders summary information and a working link to settings

title: Trigger suspended customer state
steps: 1. Open /app/settings | 2. Use the demo suspend toggle/action | 3. Return to a customer route
expected_result: Customer state changes to suspended and customer pages reflect the suspended account state

title: Review offline fallback page
steps: 1. Open /offline | 2. Review the page layout and messaging
expected_result: Offline fallback page renders cleanly without missing content or broken layout

title: Load merchant dashboard
steps: 1. Open /merchant | 2. Review merchant shell, sidebar, and summary cards
expected_result: Merchant dashboard renders with shell navigation, store summary cards, and recent data panels

title: Dashboard navigation to management pages
steps: 1. Open /merchant | 2. Use links from recent orders or top products cards
expected_result: Links navigate correctly to merchant management pages such as /merchant/orders and /merchant/products

title: Load merchant products list
steps: 1. Open /merchant/products | 2. Review visible product rows
expected_result: Only products belonging to the demo merchant store are listed

title: Edit product price and stock
steps: 1. Enter edit mode on a product row | 2. Change price and stock values | 3. Save or apply the update
expected_result: Updated price and stock values are reflected immediately in local merchant state

title: Cycle product status
steps: 1. On a product row click the status change action repeatedly
expected_result: Product status cycles through the available states and the badge updates immediately

title: Load merchant orders list
steps: 1. Open /merchant/orders | 2. Review listed orders
expected_result: Only orders for the merchant's store are shown

title: Advance order status
precondition: Merchant orders page has at least one order
steps: 1. Open /merchant/orders | 2. Advance an order to the next status
expected_result: Order status updates immediately in local state and the visible badge text changes

title: Update merchant store settings
steps: 1. Open /merchant/settings | 2. Edit store fields | 3. Save or apply the changes
expected_result: Updated store values are saved in-session and reflected in merchant state

title: Verify settings changes on dashboard
precondition: Merchant store settings were updated in the current session
steps: 1. Return to /merchant after updating settings | 2. Review displayed store details
expected_result: Dashboard shows the latest in-session store values after settings changes
